name: Advanced Mathematics
description: A rigorous upper-secondary course focused on algebra, calculus foundations, problem solving, and exam strategy.

name: Academic English & Writing
description: Develops academic writing, presentation, and critical reading skills for university applications and coursework.

name: Mongolian Language & Literature
description: Strengthens language mastery, interpretation, and formal writing aligned with national standards.

name: Integrated Science
description: Inquiry-based science course combining biology, chemistry, and physics through thematic projects.

name: Global Perspectives
description: A research and discussion course developing argumentation, collaboration, and evidence-based communication.
